caption_text:
The most surreal and humbling day of my career. 

My FIRST Golden Globe nomination! 🙏🏾🤎

THANK YOU @goldenglobes for this incredibly inspiring honor and acknowledgment of the story we told and souls we bared. 

What a privilege to be included with such an insane cadre of artists whose extraordinary performances all have raised the standard. 

Getting the opportunity to live in the skin of Mark Kerr was the most life changing and beautiful experience of my career - and my gratitude runs deep to Mark for trusting me with his story and ultimately, trusting me with his life. 

Celebrating my brother and our fearlessly empathetic director, the brilliant and hungry Benny Safdie @bowedtie - and I count my lucky stars to have the greatest scene partner of all time, Emily Blunt, whose RAW, heart wrenching, and lived in performance as Dawn Staples, moves us all to aching tears. 

Finally, I’m still in awe of the transformative, prosthetic make-up work of the great, Kazu Hiro @kazustudios and all of the Smashing Machine crew who truly became a family and left it all on the screen. 

This experience was life changing and unlocking. 

Thank you to ALL OF YOU for “ walking down this road with me” on this wild and unpredictable journey of life… 

and art. 

🤎🙏🏾

caption_text:
time to show the world what brotherly love looks like.. 

pullin’ up, flow state energy, got my 🗡️ in hand ~ heads are coming off 💀😈

had the most fun night, and that sold out Inglewood crowd went fucking nuts 💥🎤🔥 

keep bringing joy to the world @kevinhart4real, love U and always got your back my brother!!!

🥃

caption_text:
From Milwaukee to Motunui, legend recognizes legend.
Experience #Moana only in theaters 7/10 🪝

Ink. Art. NYC. ⚡️

Our @PAPATUI_ is pulling up to the New York Empire State Tattoo Expo, May 22–24.

Come watch my tattoo artist @yomicoart tattoo live on Saturday and explore the full PAPATUI tattoo care collection all weekend long. 

My brother Yomico’s artistry is extraordinary, come check him out. 

And swing by the booth and PAPATUI will send you home with some free gear 👊🏾

#EmpireStateTattooExpo 
#NYC 
#PAPATUI

caption_text:
Your boy was in Vegas for some biz and before I went wheels up 🛫 I did a little surprise “Rock pull up” to see my friends at @TotalWine and make sure my fellow late-night shoppers went home well stocked with @Teremana 
🛒 🥃

Until next time, Vegas..

Toodaloo✌🏾

#teremana 
#matchmadeinheaven

Delivering for all my dudes 🤜🏾🤛🏼
Shout to @mensjournal!! 

Massive thank you to my guys (and gals;)…

for making PAPATUI #1 in men’s care🥇👊🏾

Enjoy your Papa!! 

#papatui 
#oneskin 
@target 🎯

Holy smokes 🙏🏾🔥👊🏾 

First day of sales on @amazon and you completely sold @papatui_ out!!! 

We’re growing nicely, but the best part of all this is seeing all my dudes take great care of themselves!!! Keep it up my guys, we only get one skin 🤜🏾🤛🏼 

#papatui
#oneskin
@amazon

caption_text:
FINALLY!! Hawaiian Shave Ice @ZOAEnergy has arrived 
🏝️☀️🧊

When it comes to flavors - whether it’s ZOA, my pre-workout powder, protein powder, chewing gum etc… 

I’m always pushing for fun flavors that take me back to being that big ass, rebellious kid 😈😝

Enjoy our new Hawaiian Shave Ice for a limited time - this summer only. 

Yesssaaah 🤙🏾 

#ZOA 
#HawaiianShaveIce 
#LimitedTimeOnly

caption_text:
Very cool (and wild) news but true — THE SMASHING MACHINE has just been released in theaters in JAPAN this weekend! 🇯🇵🥂 
(streaming will be available after the theatrical run) 

Every country around the world has their own distribution rights and Japan’s theatrical window was always scheduled for May 2026.

I’m absolutely thrilled Japanese fans can finally see, our film - Smashing Machine changed my life in many ways, and the time I spent in Japan filming our movie, instilled a deeper appreciation and curiosity for Japanese culture, that I ultimately began to embody and apply to my own lifestyle. 

Japan ~ enjoy The Smashing Machine and I’ll see you THIS JULY when I return to your island nation. 

~ dj
